hooks.command: [Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; $d = if ($env:CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR) { $env:CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR } else { '.' }; $rm = Join-Path $d 'wiki/syntheses/roadmap.md'; if (Test-Path $rm) { $L = Get-Content $rm; $s = ($L | Select-String -SimpleMatch '<!-- EXEC:START -->' | Select-Object -First 1).LineNumber; $e = ($L | Select-String -SimpleMatch '<!-- EXEC:END -->' | Select-Object -First 1).LineNumber; if ($s -and $e -and $e -gt ($s + 1)) { '=== ROADMAP (executive) ==='; $L[$s..($e - 2)]; '' } }; $idx = Join-Path $d 'wiki/index.md'; if (Test-Path $idx) { '=== WIKI INDEX ==='; Get-Content $idx -Raw }; $logDir = Join-Path $d 'wiki/log'; $log = if (Test-Path $logDir) { Get-ChildItem $logDir -Filter '*.md' | Where-Object { $_.Name -ne 'index.md' } | Sort-Object Name | Select-Object -Last 1 -ExpandProperty FullName } else { $f = Join-Path $d 'wiki/log.md'; if (Test-Path $f) { $f } }; if ($log) { ''; '=== WIKI LOG (coda) ==='; Get-Content $log -Tail 20 }; ''; 'Promemoria: durante le attivita di progetto delega l aggiornamento del wiki all agente wiki-curator (vedi CLAUDE.md, sezione Wiki e documentazione).'
